description: Identify domains worth buying — across RDAP, WHOIS, and Porkbun pricing — without ever leaving the terminal.

novel_features.name: Top-N finalist promotion
novel_features.description: Promote the top-N candidates from a list into a finalist sub-list ranked by combined score, price, and availability.

novel_features.name: 5-year true-cost budget filter
novel_features.description: Filter candidates whose 5-year total cost (registration + 4 renewals) is under your ceiling, sorted ascending.

novel_features.name: Side-by-side compare
novel_features.description: One row per domain with score, length, TLD prestige, cross-registrar price, RDAP status, and drop flag.

novel_features.name: Drop timeline by score
novel_features.description: Time-axis view of every watched domain hitting pendingDelete/redemptionPeriod, filtered by brandability score and TLD.

novel_features.name: Why-killed audit
novel_features.description: Show why a domain is no longer on the active shortlist: status, score, notes, tag history, last price.

novel_features.name: Pricing arbitrage radar
novel_features.description: Rank TLDs by renewal-delta (year-1 trap risk) or by prestige-to-price ratio.

novel_features.name: Drop re-release window
novel_features.description: Compute the exact UTC re-release window for a domain in pendingDelete (RDAP event + 5-day grace).

novel_features.name: Seed-to-TLD affinity
novel_features.description: Given a seed keyword, rank TLDs by suffix-semantics fit, historical availability rate in local history, and price tier.
